inputs.text: Xin chào, tôi là một giọng đọc thử nghiệm của VieNeu-TTS v3 Turbo. Today we will test Vietnamese, English, and mixed-language synthesis in the same prompt [cười].

expected.output: 48 kHz speech generated through the VieNeu v3 native runtime.
manualChecks: Preset voice selection works or falls back with a clear UI/runtime error.
Vietnamese and English text are both spoken.
The non-verbal tag is accepted and does not break synthesis.
